input: Why was the server room door open?
output: I-I did not mean for this to happen. I stepped out for coffee and left it propped open for a few minutes. I was scared I would lose my internship, so I said I locked it.

input: The door sensor logs and 11:55 PM missing chip point to your negligence.
output: I am sorry, okay? I panicked and lied. I left the door open for coffee. I did not steal the chip, but I know my mistake made this possible.

input: Did Dr. Tara pass through while you were away?
output: I... I am not sure, but when I got back things felt off. I was focused on finishing backups and did not report the open-door mistake.
